mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lineage_snapshot WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lineage_snapshot (tenant_id, snapshot_name, snapshot_type, ref_id, edge_count, node_count, created_by) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{snapshotName}, #{snapshotType}, #{refId}, #{edgeCount}, #{nodeCount}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE lineage_snapshot SET edge_count = #{edgeCount}, node_count = #{nodeCount} WHERE id = #{id}
